text: Welcome Diana, Karim, and the UrbanFlow team! This channel is for all our deal coordination. Looking forward to working together.
Hi all. I'll be managing timeline and documentation. Quick question: do you have any existing legal counsel, or should we recommend our firm for the review?
Thanks for the welcome! We have a local counsel in Milan, but we're open to your firm if they're more familiar with SAFE structures. What do you recommend?
Either works. If you want someone who knows our standard terms, we can introduce you to our counsel. If you trust your Milan firm, that's fine too — just need to coordinate timing.
We'll go with your recommendation. Simplifies things. When can we schedule the legal review?
Week of Nov 18th. Let's target Wednesday Nov 19 or Thursday Nov 20. Diana and Karim — what works for you?
Nov 20 morning is better for us (Karim has a board commitment on the 19th). 10:00 CET?
Perfect. Nov 20 at 10:00 CET it is. I'll send the Zoom link and doc checklist by EOD today.
Quick clarification on the milestone clause before legal review: the 9-month clock for the second tranche — does it start from SAFE signing or from fund disbursement? Important for our planning.
From fund disbursement. So if we sign Nov 22 and funds hit Nov 24, the clock starts Nov 24. Month 9 would be late August.
Got it. That's actually better for our timeline. Thanks for clarifying.
Legal review went well this morning. Couple of minor clarifications, but nothing blocking. One question: what's the board observation setup? How many seats, how often do you attend?
We typically take one observer seat. Attend monthly board meetings, plus ad-hoc support in between. Tomás will be the primary attendee, but I may join for strategic discussions.
Perfect. We have our next board meeting scheduled for Dec 15. Looking forward to having you there.
Marked on calendar. Also: once we close, I'll coordinate with you on portfolio founder network access and any other operational stuff you need.
CLOSED! Docs are signed. Diana and Karim, we'll have the first €180K to you by EOD Nov 24. Excited to back UrbanFlow's next phase.
This is fantastic. Thank you Daniel, Tomás, and the whole Vertex Minds team. We're going to make this partnership count. Grazie!
Looking forward to it. See you at the board meeting on the 15th.
